data.title: CPI data from August 14, 2024 shows calmer inflation, hinting at possible rate cuts by Fed Reserve in September.
data.description: Recent data released on August 14, 2024, shows that inflation as measured by the Consumer Price Index (CPI) has stabilized, indicating a more stable economic environment. This development is likely to pave the way for the Federal Reserve to initiate a series of interest rate cuts starting in September. Economist Lawrence Yun commented on this development, highlighting the potential for the Fed Reserve to take action amidst the calmer inflation numbers. This shift suggests a possible strategy to stimulate economic growth and stability in the near future.

data.title: Comscore's recapitalization deal eliminates $18 million annual dividend, boosts financial flexibility & governance for growth.
data.description: The recent transaction has enhanced financial flexibility to boost long-term growth by eliminating the annual preferred dividend of $18 million. This move has also reinforced corporate governance and led to a realignment among stockholders.

data.title: BLAQclouds, Inc. reveals spinoff of BLAQclouds Property Group with shareholder distribution specifics.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has reached a record high of 14.7%, with over 20 million jobs lost in April due to the ongoing pandemic. This marks the highest level since the Great Depression era. The report also highlighted that there has been a sharp increase in temporary layoffs, making up about 18 million of the total job losses. The impact has been felt across various industries, with the leisure and hospitality sector being the hardest hit, experiencing a massive decline in employment. Experts are concerned about the long-term effects of this unprecedented situation on the economy and job market.

data.title: Solo Brands, Inc. simplifies with single class stock, eliminates tax agreement to align with shareholders, save cash.
data.description: Strategic initiatives are being taken to better serve shareholders' interests, with substantial cost reductions anticipated. These actions will result in notable cash savings for the company.

data.title: Thor Equities gets $18.25M financing for Wynwood sites from Centennial Bank in Miami.
data.description: In New York City on December 19, 2025, Thor Equities Group, a prominent player in urban real estate development, leasing, and management, disclosed acquiring $18,250,000 in funding from Centennial Bank. The funds are allocated for properties situated at 2724 NW 2nd Avenue and 2825 NW 2nd Avenue within Miami’s Wynwood district.

data.title: Clairvest successfully sells its interests in F12.net to private equity firm with significant equity reinvestment from existing shareholders including CEO Alex Webb.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, Clairvest Group Inc. (TSX: CVG) revealed the sale of its interests in F12.net. Clairvest, along with Clairvest Equity Partners VI, successfully completed the transaction. A prominent middle-market, growth-focused private equity firm made a majority investment in F12. Additionally, existing F12 stakeholders and the executive team, including Founder & CEO Alex Webb, contributed a significant equity reinvestment.

data.title: Qualstar Corp to reincorporate in Nevada with 3:1 split of Common Stock.
data.description: The plan involves a 3:1 split of the Company's Common Stock. This means for every share owned, investors will receive an additional two shares. This move aims to make the stock more accessible to a larger number of investors and potentially increase liquidity.

data.title: Geron Corp plans strategic restructuring for long-term value creation, aiming to boost financial growth.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to a record low of 3.7%, the lowest in the past two decades. The economy has seen a growth of 4.2% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations. Additionally, the stock market has surged, with the Dow Jones reaching an all-time high of 27,000 points. Experts attribute these positive trends to increased consumer spending and business investments. The government has also announced plans to further stimulate economic growth through infrastructure projects and tax cuts.

data.title: zSpace, Inc. undergoes strategic restructuring to enhance financial stability and operational efficiency, focusing on AR learning solutions.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, zSpace, Inc. (NASDAQ: ZSPC) based in San Jose, California, declared the completion of a strategic restructuring aimed at improving its cost structure and operational efficiency. The company, recognized as a global leader in immersive augmented reality (AR) learning solutions for education, hopes this move will facilitate long-term success. The restructuring showcases zSpace's dedication to adjusting to changing market conditions while prioritizing the provision of cutting-edge augmented and virtual reality (AR/VR) experiences. These experiences are tailored to boost performance in STEM, CTE, and career readiness programs, underscoring the company's commitment to innovation in educational technology.

data.title: Branded Legacy, Inc. undergoes management overhaul after shareholder Dr. Jamie Forrest acquires controlling interest.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on December 10, 2025, Branded Legacy, Inc. (OTC: BLEG) revealed a significant restructuring and change in leadership after Dr. Jamie Forrest, PhD, MPH obtained the majority stake in the company.
IDF: In response to Hezbollah’s repeated violations of the ceasefire understandings, the IDF is striking Hezbollah terror infrastructure sites in southern Lebanon.

data.title: Reveal Technology adds 4 new executives to leadership team in Bozeman, Mont. to enhance operator-focused capabilities.
data.description: Reveal Technology, a defense technology company based in Bozeman, Montana, recently welcomed four new executives to enhance its operator-focused capabilities. The new additions include Niko Hughes, who joins as the Chief Growth Officer. This development was announced on January 30, 2026. Founded by veterans, Reveal Technology continues to expand its team to drive further innovation and growth in the defense sector.

data.title: Amtelco celebrates 50 years in business, known for call and contact center software; leader in communications industry.
data.description: Amtelco, based in McFarland, Wisconsin, is a prominent company offering call and contact center software for answering services and healthcare. The company marks its 50th anniversary in the industry.

data.title: Tesla's "Robotaxi" trademark rejected, company may have to choose new names for autonomous vehicles after Elon Musk's comments.
data.description: Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) discussed their plan to expand autonomous vehicles nationwide during their recent fourth-quarter earnings call. The company has filed new trademarks for potential vehicle names. They were unable to trademark "Robotaxi" and may have to explore alternative names due to certain restrictions in some states. Tesla CEO Elon Musk addressed the issue, mentioning potential confusion between the terms "robo taxi" and "CyberCab" referring to a two-seater autonomous vehicle. Some states prohibit the use of certain terms like "cab" or "taxi." for these vehicles. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Inventors from San Fernando develop Glasses Slide attachment for baseball caps to secure sunglasses; offers safer storage.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 30, 2026, an invention called the GLASSES SLIDE was introduced by inventors from San Fernando, Calif. The innovators believed there was a need for a more convenient way to store sunglasses or eyewear on top of a baseball hat. Their design aims to securely hold glasses in place on the hat.

data.title: 2026 Chicago Auto Show offers four indoor test tracks and outdoor drives for hands-on excitement.
data.description: The 2026 Chicago Auto Show is set to bring exhilarating hands-on experiences to attendees with the introduction of four indoor test tracks and outdoor test drives. Scheduled to take place on January 30th, 2026, this year's event offers visitors the chance to engage with the newest automotive innovations. The indoor test tracks aim to provide immersive experiences, while the outdoor test drives allow attendees to get a feel for the latest vehicles on the market. This initiative aims to attract a record number of participants and enhance engagement at the auto show.

data.title: Luxor® Workspaces launches Industrial Collection for warehouses with heavy-duty carts, mobile workstations, and storage solutions designed for various operations.
data.description: Luxor® Workspaces has launched a new line called the Industrial Collection, specifically tailored for real work environments. This collection includes heavy-duty carts, mobile workstations, and storage solutions targeted towards warehouses, manufacturing facilities, maintenance areas, and shipping/receiving operations. The products are built to withstand rigorous use and offer mobility to support material handling.
